name: vscode-extension-wikiparser
description: Language server extension for MediaWiki Wikitext that supports linting, autocomplete, and more.
author: Bhsd

wikiparser.linter.config.markdownDescription: The path to the [linter configuration](https://github.com/bhsd-harry/wikiparser-node/wiki/Rules#configuration) file. It can be a path relative to the directory of the active file or an absolute path.

wikiparser.linter.lilypond.markdownDescription: The path to the LilyPond executable.

wikiparser.inlay.description: Enable inlay hints for Wikitext files.

wikiparser.completion.description: Enable code completions for Wikitext files.

wikiparser.color.description: Enable color decorators for Wikitext files.

wikiparser.signature.description: Enable parser function signature help for Wikitext files.

wikiparser.articlePath.markdownDescription: The global constant `wgArticlePath` of the wiki site (e.g. `https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/` or `https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/$1`).

wikiparser.config.markdownDescription: The path to the parser configuration file. It can be a path relative to the extension root or an absolute path.

wikiparser.user.markdownDescription: According to the [Wikimedia Foundation's policy](https://foundation.wikimedia.org/wiki/Policy:Wikimedia_Foundation_User-Agent_Policy), a URI for a userpage or an email address of the user may be required when accessing WMF sites. This information is only used to identify the user in the User-Agent header of HTTP requests made by the language server.

scripts.lint: npm run lint:ts && npm run lint:md
